entry.title: BOA N0001912G0006 (P00004) awarded to BELL BOEING JOINT PROJECT OFFICE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD CLAUSE H-3 TO SECTION H AND ADD ATTACHMENT 4 TO INCORPORATE THE BELL FULLY BURDENED RATES (EXCLUSIVE OF FEE) INTO THE V-22 BOA. SECTION J UPDATED TO REFLECT P00003. SEE THE FOLLOWING PAGES.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: BOA N0001912G0006 (P00005) awarded to BELL BOEING JOINT PROJECT OFFICE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE ATTACHMENT 4 TO INCORPORATE FULLY-BURDENED RATES (EXCLUSIVE OF FEE) INTO THE V-22 BOA FOR THE BOEING TEST AND EVALUATION (BT&E) INTERAGENCY WORK TRANSFER (IWT).

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: BOA N0001912G0006 (P00006) awarded to BELL BOEING JOINT PROJECT OFFICE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: BLANKET DPAS RATING FOR THIS AGREEMENT AND ALL FUTURE ORDERS UNLESS OTHERWISE STATED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: BOA N0001912G0006 (P00007) awarded to BELL BOEING JOINT PROJECT OFFICE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE THREE (3) PURPOSES OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION ARE TO: UPDATE REVISED CLAUSES DFAR 252.225-7040, DFARS 252.225-7995, FAR 52.225-19, FAR 52.219-9, AND DFARS 252.219-7003; UPDATE BOTH DD254S FOR BELL AND BOEING; AND INCORPORATE NEW SECTION I AND H SPECIAL INSTRUCTIONS FOR PATENT CLAUSES FAR 52.227-10, DFARS 252.227-7038, AND NAVAIR 5252.227-9501

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING
